name: fan-tub-adapter-v2
description: Two-part tool-free fan mount: base plate (caulked to lid) + snap-on retention clip, with 119mm fan reference.

parts.name: base
parts.description: Base plate — caulked to tub lid, clip ledges on locating rim

parts.name: fan
parts.description: 119mm fan frame (reference, not printed). Sits on inner plate at z=5.0

parts.name: clip
parts.description: Retention clip — local z=0 (hook bottom) maps to global z=6.15

interference.description: Base-clip overlap is expected at hook engagement zone; limit total interference volume
Fan must sit inside locating rim with clearance — zero intersection allowed
Clip frame sits on fan top — no mesh overlap when properly positioned

fitSpecs.name: clip-hook-ledge-engagement
fitSpecs.description: Hook-to-ledge interference volume confirms positive engagement

fitSpecs.name: fan-in-rim-clearance
fitSpecs.description: Gap between fan frame and locating rim inner wall (should be loc_clearance=0.5mm)
